hero.question: Will Ubisoft be acquired before 2027?
hero.prob_take: The 10-point drop to 23% signals insiders know something about Ubisoft's latest turnaround plan, either real progress on Star Wars Outlaws or internal deals that reduce acquisition pressure. At 23%, the market is pricing in basically zero probability of the activist investor plays or tech giants desperate enough to overpay for IP, which feels like the market threw the baby out with the bathwater after Vivendi retreated.

daily_take.headline: Ubisoft Acquisition Odds Crater 10 Points. Market Knows Something.
daily_take.deck: Ubisoft's odds just tanked from 33% to 23% on 548K volume, signaling serious conviction that a deal is off the table. Either a strategic shift announcement killed buyer interest or insiders are front-running bad news. The 23% floor looks like capitulation pricing. Smart money is sniffing for a bounce on any M&A rumor in the next 6 months.
